enrichment.summary: Kyle does a catch-up daily vlog from his Boulder home, recapping the previous day: his hamster escaped and is likely dead, he biked to work, spent the day on his porch organizing playlists and doing website work, and reflects on his casual bike commute and continuous marijuana use since Colorado legalization.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: resigned acceptance — it's probably dead, 'it's fine'
refuses to race his commute; wants to enjoy the ride and smell the flowers
casual and positive — has been continuously high since legalization, considers functionality essentially normal
